caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a gold chain, and a black baseball cap with a logo sits in a recording studio setting. He is wearing grey over-ear headphones and speaking into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a white wall featuring gold stars and text that reads "GRIND HUSTLE". To his right, a screen displays the word "BOSS" in red letters and "TALK 101" in white and red. On-screen graphics include a podcast logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". The man's t-shirt has the phrase "CHECK IT!" printed on the front. Throughout the sequence, the man maintains his position while speaking, with slight variations in his facial expression and head tilt as he communicates. The camera remains stationary, focusing on him from the chest up.
